creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #0)

When in doubt if blog author (me) allows it - let me be clear here.

All posts on my blog - https://vermaden.wordpress.com/ - are posted under FreeBSD License. This means that you can use/copy whatever you want - you just need to mention the author.

Hope that helps.

Regards.
